intended_use: AI-Rad Companion (Engine) is a software platform that provides basic visualization and enables external post-processing extension for medical images used for diagnostic purposes. The software platform
intended_use_full: AI-Rad Companion (Engine) is a software platform that provides basic visualization and enables external post-processing extension for medical images used for diagnostic purposes. The software platform is designed to support technicians and trained physicians in qualitative and quantitative measurement and analysis of clinical data. The software platform provides means for storing of data and for transferring data into other systems such as PACS systems. The software platform provides an interface to integrate processing extensions.
